---
title: "Quarto Slide Demo"
subtitle: "RevealJS and Beamer from one file"
author: "Imad El Badisy"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    slide-number: true
  beamer:
    theme: Madrid
    colortheme: crane
    slide-level: 2
    pdf-engine: xelatex
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Start

## Why Slides in Quarto?

- Write slides in plain text
- Include code and output
- Render to HTML slides or PDF slides
- Keep examples reproducible

## Slide Structure

```markdown
# Section

## Slide title

- Point one
- Point two
```

## A Small Figure

```{r}
#| label: fig-pressure-slide
#| fig-cap: "Pressure data in a slide."
#| echo: false

plot(pressure, pch = 19, col = "#1f77b4",
     xlab = "Temperature", ylab = "Pressure")
```

## Render Commands

```bash
quarto render slides.qmd --to revealjs
quarto render slides.qmd --to beamer
```
